title: Topic, Headers, Alternate, and Exchange-to-Exchange Routing · Type-System Trace: Alternate Exchange Routing
summary: Routing keys encode unstable JSON, topic wildcards overlap unexpectedly, headers matching trusts absent fields, and unroutable messages vanish because mandatory and alternate behavior are not designed together. Planned artifact: Add and verify the alternate exchange routing increment in multi-strategy routing and unroutable-message table. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Route unmatched messages to an alternate exchange with observable ownership and distinguish it from mandatory returns.
Use headers exchanges only with typed bounded metadata and explicit all-versus-any matching, not as a schema-free routing escape hatch.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Alternate Exchange Routing · Theory Alternate Exchange Routing
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory messaging team handles case 9572 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to classify primary, alternate, returned, and invalid routing outcomes; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement decision owner; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Alternate Exchange Routing contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Alternate Exchange Routing · Theory Alternate Exchange Routing.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for route unmatched messages to an alternate exchange with observable ownership and distinguish it from mandatory returns. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Alternate Exchange Routing · Theory Alternate Exchange Routing, keep Alternate Exchange Routing connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name publisher intent, exchange and routing evidence, queue responsibility, message identity, ownership transfer, byte, time, attempt, and concurrency budgets, terminal delivery decision, effect, cleanup, and recovery; run a pure deterministic TypeScript model; then change one message or failure and state the amqplib, RabbitMQ, TLS, partition, restart, load, upgrade, or production transfer gate.
